title: Trump's peace board faces a cash crunch
summary_full: Donald Trump's Board of Peace has secured only a fraction of the $17 billion pledged for Gaza's reconstruction and governance.  Despite billions pledged by Gulf Arab states, only three countries have contributed funds, totaling under $1 billion. The ongoing war with Iran has further complicated these funding difficulties.
